summary: Markets exhibit mixed sentiment on April 25, 2026, with gold facing bearish pressures from high inflation indicators and no rate cuts, while Bitcoin holds steady above key levels per prediction markets. Forex and crypto signals remain subdued amid FOMC blackout, and stocks linger at highs without fresh breakdowns. Overall mood leans neutral to cautious across crypto, commodities, and forex.

signals.name: Gold
signals.reason: High 4% PPI, all-time high stocks, and positive NFP prevent rate cuts, risking breakdown below $4600 support toward $4000.

signals.name: Bitcoin
signals.reason: Polymarket assigns 100% probability to BTC above $66,000 on April 25, reflecting strong trader consensus.

signals.name: EUR/USD
signals.reason: No specific directional bias amid FOMC blackout period in recent forex analysis.

signals.name: GBP/USD
signals.reason: Covered in macro analysis without clear bullish or bearish call during FOMC news week.

signals.name: Silver
signals.reason: Mentioned in forex technical analysis but lacks specific sentiment amid rate pause expectations.

signals.name: S&P 500
signals.reason: Trading at all-time highs, supporting no-rate-cut environment despite gold pressures.

signals.name: Ethereum
signals.reason: No recent mentions from top sources, aligning with broader crypto lull.
